get.description: Return list of accessed basemap for the user.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number in pagination

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Total records in a page

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Fields to be sorted should be specified as a comma-separated list.e.g: sort=name for asc, -sort=name for desc

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Fields to be returned should be specified as a comma-separated list.e.g: fields=__all__ for returning all fields, fields=name,category to return just name and category

parameters.name: name__contains
parameters.description: Filter data by partial name.

parameters.name: description__contains
parameters.description: Filter data by partial description.

parameters.name: category__name__in
parameters.description: Filter data by multiple category. Put multiple filter using comma separator.

parameters.name: type__in
parameters.description: Filter data by multiple type. Put multiple filter using comma separator.

parameters.name: project_slug__in
parameters.description: Filter data by multiple project slug. Put multiple filter using comma separator.

parameters.name: project_id__in
parameters.description: Filter data by multiple project id. Put multiple filter using comma separator.

get.description: Retrieve features of accessed context layer for the user.Specifically for cloud native layer.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number in pagination

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Total records in a page

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Fields to be sorted should be specified as a comma-separated list.e.g: sort=name for asc, -sort=name for desc

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Fields to be returned should be specified as a comma-separated list.e.g: fields=__all__ for returning all fields, fields=name,category to return just name and category

post.description:
Add new feature(s) for the accessed context layer for the user.
Need to be at least edit data permission.

Payload is geojson format. The geometry type should be the same with the current data.

schema.description: Geojson data.
Geojson data.

patch.description:
Update filtered feature of the accessed context layer for the user. Restricted to updating only one feature at a time. 
Need to be at least edit data permission.

Payload is in json with field names as keys and value as the new value. 
e.g. {"field_1": "new_value", "field_2": "new_value}.

delete.description:
Remove filtered feature of the accessed context layer for the user. Restricted to deleting only one feature at a time.
Need to be at least edit data permission.

post.description:
Replace all data ofthe accessed context layer for the user.
Need to be at least edit data permission.

Payload is geojson format.

schema.description: Geojson data.
Geojson data.

put.description: Replace a detailed of context layer.

schema.description: Data that is needed to create/edit context layer.

style_type.title: Aggregation multiple values
style_type.description: The choices are ['Dynamic qualitative style.', 'Dynamic quantitative style.', 'Predefined style/color rules.', 'Style from library.']

style_config.title: Styles
style_config.description: JSON object containing style configuration for dynamic style types. When style_type is DYNAMIC_QUALITATIVE or DYNAMIC_QUANTITATIVE, the following keys are expected: color_palette (int), color_palette_reverse (bool), dynamic_class_num (int), sync_outline (bool), sync_filter (bool), outline_color (str), outline_size (float), dynamic_classification — one of ['Equidistant.', 'Natural breaks.', 'Quantile.', 'Std deviation.', 'Arithmetic progression.', 'Geometric progression.'], and no_data_rule (object with name, rule, color, outline_color, outline_size, active).

layer_type.title: Layer type
layer_type.description:
The type of layer for this context layer.
For ArcGIS, put feature server of REST. e.g : https://{host}/rest/services/{layer}/FeatureServer/1.
For GeoJson, put url of geojson.
For Raster tile, put XYZ url.
For Raster COG, put url of cog.
For Related table, select existing related table name.
For Vector tile, put XYZ url.
For Cloud native gis layer, select the layer from cloud native gis.

shortcode.title: Shortcode
shortcode.description: A computer-to-computer shortcode for this indicator. For example, an abbreviated name that you might use to refer to it in a spreadsheet column.

concept_uuid.title: Concept uuid
concept_uuid.description: This is concept uuid from georepo.

example.name: My related table
example.description: A related table for testing apidocs
example.creator: Admin

properties.title: Row values
properties.description: Keys are field names from fields_definition in the associated related table
